name: Vegetable Pullao
recipeIngredient: 3 medium sized carrots, diced into 1-inch long pieces
2 medium size potatoes, peeled and diced into 1-inch pieces
1 cup green peas, fresh or defrosted
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the rice in water for about an hour. Drain and set aside.
2. Put half of an onion and all the garlic, ginger, and chillies into a blender. Add 4 or 5 tablespoons of water and blend into a smooth paste.
3. Break the cinnamon stick into small pieces. Also break each of the cloves in half.
4. Heat a large pan (preferably non-stick) on medium flame. Put in the butter and, as soon as it melts, add the cinnamon, cloves, and bay leaves.
5. Stir for a few seconds, then add the rest of the diced onions. Stir and fry until the onion starts to turn brown.
6. Add the mixture from the blender and fry for about a minute, stirring often. Make sure the mixture does not get burnt.
7. Add the drained rice to the pan and continue frying until the rice becomes translucent. You may need to add more butter.
8. Add 4 cups of water to the pan. Put in all the vegetables, salt, and turmeric. Cover and cook until the rice is done.
